meta.title: Li diurn jocu de paroles
meta.description: Divina li parol celat in 6 probas (o minu). Un nov enigma es disponibil chascun die!
meta.keywords: occidental, enigma, parol, jocu, in linea, divinar, diurn

unlimited.title: Play unlimited — no waiting
unlimited.description: Play unlimited Wordle in Interlingue. No waiting — get a new word every time.

speed.title: Speed Streak — race the clock
speed.description: Speed Streak: solve as many Wordle words in Interlingue as you can in 5 minutes.

dordle.title: Dordle — 2 boards at once
dordle.description: Play Dordle in Interlingue. Solve 2 Wordle boards at once with 7 guesses.

tridle.title: Tridle — 3 boards at once
tridle.description: Play Tridle in Interlingue. Solve 3 Wordle boards at once with 8 guesses.

quordle.title: Quordle — 4 boards at once
quordle.description: Play Quordle in Interlingue. Solve 4 Wordle boards at once with 9 guesses.

octordle.title: Octordle — 8 boards at once
octordle.description: Play Octordle in Interlingue. Solve 8 Wordle boards at once with 13 guesses.

sedecordle.title: Sedecordle — 16 boards at once
sedecordle.description: Play Sedecordle in Interlingue. Solve 16 Wordle boards at once with 21 guesses.

duotrigordle.title: Duotrigordle — 32 boards at once
duotrigordle.description: Play Duotrigordle in Interlingue. Solve 32 Wordle boards at once with 37 guesses.

text.no_attempts: You haven't tried any words yet!
text.share_challenge_win: Yo solvit li hodiernal Wordle in {n} provas. Posse tu far plu bon?
text.share_challenge_lose: Yo ne solvit li hodiernal Wordle. E tu?
text.hard_mode_position: Mod desfacil: {letter} deve esser in position {position}
text.hard_mode_contains: Mod desfacil: li proba deve contener {letter}

help.title: How to Play
help.text_1_2: Each guess must be a valid five letter word. Press the enter button to submit your guess.
help.text_1_3: After you guess, the tiles will change color to indicate which letters of your word are correct or almost correct.
help.text_2_1: is in the word and in the correct location!
help.text_2_2: is in the word, but not in the correct location.
help.text_2_3: is not present in the word you are trying to guess.
help.text_3: A new word will be available each day!
help.speed_explanation: You start with 5 minutes on the clock. Solve words to earn bonus time. Miss a word and you lose 30 seconds.
help.speed_scoring_explanation: Points = (7 − guesses) × 100 × combo multiplier. Consecutive solves build your combo up to 3x. A failed word resets your combo.
help.speed_pressure_explanation: Every 3 words solved, the timer speeds up. The longer you survive, the harder it gets.

ui.word_info_desc: Definition e arte AI pos li jocu
ui.install_app_desc: Jocar sin-linea e obtener li icone
ui.play_more_languages: Joca plu lingues por vider tui statistica global!
ui.play_daily_like_app: Joca Wordle chascun die quam un app
ui.no_games_yet: Tu ancor ne ha jocat. Selecte un lingue por comensar!
ui.easy_desc: Qualcunc parol es acceptat, mem si ne es in li dictionarium
ui.normal_desc: Li probas deve esser valid paroles del dictionarium
ui.hard_desc: Li revelat indicies deve esser usat in li sequent probas
ui.todays_word_reveal: Li parol de hodie — Joca por revelar!
ui.future_word: Ti parol ancor ne ha esset jocat. Reveni plu tard!
ui.difficulty_locked: Ne posse cambiar li desfacilitá pos divination
ui.streak_footer: Streak counts classic daily puzzles in any language. Play once a day to keep it going.
ui.mode_daily_desc: One word per day. 6 guesses. The classic.
ui.mode_unlimited_desc: Random words, no limit. Play as much as you want.
ui.mode_speed_desc: Race the clock. Solve as many words as you can before time runs out.
ui.mode_custom_desc: Pick a word, share a link. Challenge your friends.
ui.mode_party_desc: Play the same word with friends. See who solves it fastest.
ui.homepage_languages_counting: languages and counting — more added regularly.
ui.homepage_and_more_desc: Octordle, Semantic Explorer, Custom Word, Party Mode — and more coming soon.
